creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
The description begins: 

> msg-extract …

That's not found (see below). 

I'd like it to be found – it's easier to type than extract_msg – but let's correct the description to use the name of the binary. 


% which msg-extract
msg-extract: Command not found.
% which extract_msg
/usr/local/bin/extract_msg
% pkg info --list textproc/py-extract-msg | grep bin/
        /usr/local/bin/extract_msg
%
